name: AzureFederatedAuth
description: Requests an OIDC token for an AzureRM service connection and exports ARM_OIDC_TOKEN, ARM_TENANT_ID, ARM_CLIENT_ID, and optionally GIT_ACCESS_TOKEN for Azure DevOps Git HTTPS auth.
helpMarkDown: Private task for YAML pipelines on Linux agents.
author: private

inputs.name: serviceConnectionARM
inputs.label: Azure Resource Manager service connection
inputs.helpMarkDown: AzureRM service connection used to request the OIDC token.

inputs.name: setGitAccessToken
inputs.label: Also set GIT_ACCESS_TOKEN for Azure DevOps Git HTTPS auth
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, exchanges the OIDC token for an Entra access token scoped to Azure DevOps (499b84ac-1321-427f-aa17-267ca6975798/.default) and sets secret variable GIT_ACCESS_TOKEN.
